meaning: Franklin Delano Roosevelt富兰克林·德兰诺·罗斯福(美国第三十二任总统)
examples: Mr Obama will follow FDR in uniting the country.
To the right, way back when, FDR was “That Man.” Now Obama is “that one.”
Of the more than 10, 000 photos of FDR in his archives, only four depict him in his wheelchair.
However, among voters ages 18-29, FDR scores higher for greatness than does Reagan, 62% to 55%.
The government of FDR and in all succeeding Democratic administrations has been more active than passive.
